title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WESTERN TREASURE VALLEY BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 573 SW 3rd Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 2:45pm-6:30pm on regular school days (follows the Ontario School District calendar), Summer: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5:30pm, Orientation: Wednesday 5:30pm Email (541) 889-7979 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-7979 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. New members must attend an orientation meeting. FEES: Membership fee: $20 per child per school year. Additional fees apply for services. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income for financial assistance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97913, 97914, and 97918 (Cities of Nyssa, Ontario, and Vale and surrounding areas) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located across from the Red Apple parking lot on the Ontario Middle School campus Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
